criteria.name: Thumb-stop cover
criteria.note: 10-word authority declarative + rendered gold-seal focal point, reads at 432px; strong but a quiet declarative with no number.

criteria.name: Story arc & swipe momentum
criteria.note: Clean 9-beat arc; seal state machine binds the sequence; contact sheet reads as one composed run.

criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.note: GPU-PBR gold seal is a genuine dimensional hero recurring as a state machine, but 8 of 9 slides are flat editorial/data at density 3; recurring series ceiling.

criteria.name: Story-art fusion
criteria.note: Seal encodes the story literally; 40x bar = 40x length, 41/50 dots = 80%+, 31 dots = n=31, S7 refuses to fabricate a 2025 point.

criteria.name: Alaska authenticity & local relevance
criteria.note: ANTHC, SCF, Maniilaq, Anchorage, Stanford, Cerner AI Scribe, 40x medevac, 80% roadless; deeply Alaskan.

criteria.name: Insight density & factual weight
criteria.note: Every content slide adds a verified specific, but the deck rests on one paper plus a same-team companion; honestly framed.

criteria.name: Variety vs ledger
criteria.note: Fresh authority-seal chassis, new hook archetype, Fraunces+Archivo+JBMono trio diverge; docked for the house deep_night navy base reappearing.

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.note: Body 32-38px, safe zones held, readable at 432px, vector PDF 2.8MB with title, counters present.

criteria.name: Copy voice & hook
criteria.note: 42-char definition-subversion hook, analytical voice, real debatable close; hook clever but soft.

criteria.name: Deliverable completeness
criteria.note: post_copy, 3 hashtags, first-comment source block with primary + companion links, title, 9 slides, thumbs, contact sheet, aftercare all present.

one_sentence_fix: Lift the deck off its single rendered seal by giving two or three flat editorial/data slides real dimensional depth or filling their dead lower zones, so artwork craft stops being the recurring ceiling.
honest_shortfalls: Artwork rests almost entirely on the one GPU-PBR seal; 8 of 9 slides are flat with some dead lower zones (recurring series ceiling, artwork craft 7).

Single-source deck: all 15 claims trace to one IJCH paper plus a same-team, not-independent companion, capping genuine factual weight even though the 58e honesty architecture handles it with real craft.
Palette base is the house deep_night navy again, so palette-family divergence is weaker than the fresh hero/hook/type suggest.
Cover and hook are strong but quiet declaratives with no number, so the thumb-stop is very good rather than best-in-class.
resolved_after_scoring: The S6 'n = 31' stamp was gold (a gold-budget break); recolored to forget-me-not to hold gold as authority-only. Re-rendered, QA PASS, record-sync PASS.
editor_notes_for_email: Ship-worthy at 8.90 vs 8.3, zero hard fails, honesty handled with genuine craft (persistent provenance stamp, DEPLOYED vs PROPOSED discipline on S4, n=31 snapshot stamp, and S7's chart that refuses to invent a 2025 number). A deliberate starved-window governance-context deck built on one ~9-week-old peer-reviewed paper plus a same-team companion, framed explicitly as such on S8 and in the first comment, NOT breaking news; keep that framing when posting and route replies to the who-decides question. Paste the first-comment source block within about 60 seconds of posting.
